title: Cohort profile: the LHIV-Manitoba clinical cohort of people living with HIV in Manitoba, Canada.
author: McClarty LM Cheuk E Ireland L Kendall C Bibeau C Loeppky C Kasper K Keynan Y Blanchard J Becker M
content:
S-EPMC7259858 PMC7259858 Cohort profile: the LHIV-Manitoba clinical cohort of people living with HIV in Manitoba, Canada.

Purpose

The LHIV-Manitoba cohort was developed as a way to provide a comprehensive source of HIV-related health information in the central Canadian Prairie province
